Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8

Functional Name ECM

Sent Bytes 2121
Reply Bytes 6121000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000

diag. byte stored upoon receptioon of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash framediag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frameimmobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCMimmobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECMimmobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure modeimmobilliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to no BCM authorizationBit indicating that the lmmobiiiser diagnosis is availableconnection status with ECU n 8(AC)connection status with ECU n 7(ACC)connection status with ECU n 6connection status with ECU n 5connection status with ECU n 4(BCM)connection status with ECU n 3(IP)connection status with ECU n 2(ABS)'connection status with ECU n 1(engine controle unit) only for LPG ECUconnection status with ECU n 16connection status with ECU n 15connection status with ECU n 14(SWA)connection status with ECU n 13connection status with ECU n 12connection status with ECU n 11connection status with ECU n 10connection status with ECU n 9(AGB)connection status with ECU n 24connection status with ECU n 23connection status with ECU n 22connection status with ECU n 21connection status with ECU n 20(USM)connection status with ECU n 19connection status with ECU n 18connection status with ECU n 17Carrir ftdivst1Carrir ftdivst2Carrir ftdivst3High speed engine fan delayed commandLow speed engine fan delayed commandFan 2 activation request from agbFan 1 activation request from agbFan 2 activation request from acFan 1 activation request from acFan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine manegementFan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine manegementAir conditionning pressure detection . Stored in E2PROMAir conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failuerAir conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failuerAir conditionning pressure sensor short circuit detected failuerAir conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failuerRelative air conditioning pressure for diagnosisDiesel Pre heating done PrechaskDiesel Pre heating lamp command PrechoutSpecific request DmdspecStatus of starter Atatudem(isb)Status of starter Atatudem(msb)First start detected yet FirstdemStarter fault DefdemECM Cranking authorization Topecm (msb)ECM Cranking authorization Topecm (isb)Engine status Etamotmx (msb)Engine status Etamotmx (isb)Engine speedCoolant temperature in C

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
